# pitch

Monorepo root for zeee-pitch-zooo — a pnpm workspace orchestrating web frontend (`apps/web`), Python API (`apps/api`), shared TypeScript types (`packages/shared-types`), Supabase local dev environment, and strategic documentation.

## Stack

**Package Manager:** `pnpm@10.32.1` (enforced via `packageManager` field)  
**Build System:** Turborepo 2.8.17 orchestrates pipeline topology with topological task ordering  
**Database:** Supabase local dev (PostgreSQL 15, migrations via `supabase migration new`)  
**Content Generation:** Python scripts executed via `uv run content/build-all.py`  
**Workspace Pattern:** `apps/*` (deployable applications), `packages/*` (shared libraries)

## Scripts

`dev`, `build`, `lint`, `typecheck`, `test` — delegate to Turborepo task pipeline  
`db:start`, `db:stop`, `db:reset` — Supabase local instance lifecycle  
`db:migrate` — create new migration file in `supabase/migrations/`  
`content:build` — generate content artifacts via Python build system

## Pipeline Topology

Turborepo enforces build-before-check dependency chain: `^build` prerequisite gates `lint`/`typecheck`/`test` tasks. Workspace dependencies build topologically before dependents. `dev` task runs persistently without caching. `build` outputs `.next/**` (Next.js) and `dist/**` (generic artifacts).

## Subdirectories

**[docs/](./docs/)** — Strategic product requirements defining HierFinRAG/MultiFinRAG technical architecture, HITL validation workflows (99.9% accuracy vs 92% AI-only baseline), TTGNN search optimization (1000x reduction), EU AI Act compliance, VDR security controls (SOC 2 Type II, AES-256), behavioral analytics with predictive intent scoring, tiered SaaS monetization ($50-$500/month), VC attention economy constraints (3m44s average deck review).

**[supabase/](./supabase/)** — Local Supabase dev environment configuration: API port 54321, DB port 54322, Studio port 54323, PostgreSQL 15 version lock, schema exposure (`public`, `graphql_public`), JWT 3600s expiry with 10s refresh token reuse window, email double confirmation on address change, shadow database port 54320 for migration diffs.

**apps/web/** — Next.js frontend with shadcn/ui component library (Badge, Button, Card), TailwindCSS, health check endpoint at `/api/health`.

**apps/api/** — FastAPI backend (Python) with `/health` endpoint, environment-based configuration in `app/core/config.py`.

**packages/shared-types/** — TypeScript type definitions shared across workspace packages via `workspace:*` protocol.

## Behavioral Contracts

**pnpm Version Enforcement:** `packageManager = "pnpm@10.32.1"` — Corepack activates exact version lock.  
**Turborepo Task Dependencies:** `^build` (upstream builds) gates `lint`/`typecheck`/`test` — workspace dependency builds complete before dependent tasks execute.  
**Supabase Port Allocation:** API 54321, DB 54322, Studio 54323 — avoid conflicts with standard PostgreSQL 5432.  
**JWT Lifecycle:** 3600s expiry, 10s refresh reuse window — prevents race conditions during concurrent token refresh.  
**Email Change Flow:** Double confirmation enabled (`double_confirm_changes_enabled = true`) — requires old + new email verification.
